what_it_does: Renders a conditional notification bar that tells the user how many decisions are pending and opens the decisions list when clicked; it is shown only when there are pending decisions.
observations: Imports useDecisions and openDecisionsList from a local store module.
Returns null when there are no pending decisions.
Uses a button with an aria-label that repeats the visible count and singular/plural wording.
Includes a decorative dot span marked aria-hidden.
The comment describes intended placement below each layout header on portrait/desktop or atop the rail on landscape.
The comment notes the copy is an AI-supplied draft marked for Tim's later steer.
standouts: Explicit in-flow placement guidance for multiple form factors in the header comment.
Accessible button with aria-label and hidden decorative element.
Singular/plural copy is computed inline for both display and accessibility text.
conventions: React functional component with named export.
Early return for the empty state.
Uses a custom hook from a sibling store file for state.
Uses className-based styling with BEM-like names (inbox-bar, inbox-entry, inbox-entry-dot, inbox-entry-label).
concerns: The header comment states the visible copy is an AI draft awaiting Tim's steer, so it may change.
The component depends on a global store hook and an imported opener without showing how either is provided or stabilized.
No memoization; it will re-render whenever the decisions store changes.
notes: A small, conditional call-to-action component that surfaces pending decision counts and opens the decisions inbox.
questions: How does the surrounding layout know to place this bar below the header or atop the rail?
Is openDecisionsList a stable callback or does it change on every render?
Where is DecisionsInbox rendered relative to this component?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose matches the implementation: it conditionally renders a pending-decisions entry point.
intention_signals: It tries to make pending decisions noticeable but not intrusive by placing the notification in a consistent, layout-aware slot and giving it clear, accessible wording.
contribution: Provides a focused, accessible pending-decisions entry point that can be dropped into a layout slot and conditionally appears only when work awaits the user.
summary_for_embedding: DecisionsBar is a React component that displays a conditional pending-decisions notification bar and opens the decisions list when activated.
intention_for_embedding: Surface pending decision counts to the user in a layout-aware, accessible call-to-action that opens the decisions inbox.

symbols.does: Renders a conditional bar showing the count of pending decisions and opens the decisions list on click.
symbols.description: DecisionsBar is an exported React functional component that reads pending decisions from useDecisions, hides itself when none are pending, and renders an accessible button with a decorative dot and count label that invokes openDecisionsList.
